programme.desc: Santai Hujung Minggu Gegar bersama Shah Muhammad. GEGAR PAGI, Pilihan #1 Pantai Timur.

programme.desc: Pilihan dan dedikasi lagu kegemaran anda di SELEKSI GEGAR, Pilihan #1 Pantai Timur.

programme.title: THIS IS PANTAI TIMUR
programme.desc: Memainkan lagu-lagu dialek, dikir barat dan bakat dari Pantai Timur. GEGAR, Pilihan #1 Pantai Timur.

programme.desc: Kapsul agama selama sejam dan renungan di waktu senja bersama GEGAR, Pilihan #1 Pantai Timur.

programme.desc: Kedudukan 20 lagu-lagu paling hit undian anda di GEGAR, Pilihan #1 Pantai Timur.

programme.desc: Layan perasaan anda di malam hari bersama himpunan lagu-lagu leleh di GEGAR, Pilihan #1 Pantai Timur.

programme.desc: Various Galatta sequences which ends up in a rather unexpected or comical way will be highlighted in this show.

programme.desc: Playing back-to-back high rated comedy clips.

programme.title: Attrasakka
programme.desc: Enjoy these unforgettable comedy scenes featuring some of the most outrages and out of the world comedy scenes and keep on laughing.

programme.title: Sirigama Pathani
programme.desc: Back to back comedy clips with a literary or cinematic work of a comic nature that uses themes or methods of comedy and humor.

programme.title: Dishing With Chris Ep04
programme.desc: Chris is used to being interviewed by radio DJs, but today he gets to switch roles and interview the DJs instead.

programme.title: The Cook up With Adam Liaw Ep01
programme.desc: Adam is joined by Kumi Taguchi and Chase Kojima as they create some of their favourite chicken thigh recipes.

programme.title: The Cook up With Adam Liaw Ep02
programme.desc: Recipe developer Breda Fenn and Maitre d' of Momofuku Seibo fame, Kylie Javier Ashton join Adam Liaw in The Cook Up Kitchen to bring their favorite pies.

programme.title: Makan on Wheels Ep07
programme.desc: Halfway through their food truck journey, the three hosts head to Kemaman, Terengganu, to join a river terrapin conservation activity and enjoy the local fish noodles.

programme.title: Food Paradise International Ep03
programme.desc: Yummiest late night eats: juicy bourbon burger to beer-battered pickles.

programme.title: Travel With Mommy Ep10
programme.desc: Jason, Jack and their moms close the season in Taiwan! From the Tainan Anping Tree House and Fort Zeelandia, to the Tea Spa.

programme.title: Makan on Wheels Ep07
programme.desc: Halfway through their food truck journey, the three hosts head to Kemaman, Terengganu, to join a river terrapin conservation activity and enjoy the local fish noodles.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen Ep10
programme.desc: After a lesson in foraging for mushrooms, Jeremy uses his find in a comforting crispy dish, Tempura Medley of Mushrooms.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie Ep05
programme.desc: Sashi De is on a quest to understand culinary stories from around the globe.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie Ep06
programme.desc: Sashi De is on a quest to understand culinary stories from around the globe.

programme.title: Axian's Restaurant Trails Ep09
programme.desc: Exploring the cultural significance and exquisite culinary skills of Cantonese restaurants originating from Guangzhou.

programme.title: Axian's Restaurant Trails Ep10
programme.desc: Exploring the cultural significance and exquisite culinary skills of Cantonese restaurants originating from Guangzhou.

programme.title: Discovering Local Ramen by Car Ep15
programme.desc: Our drive-in ramen trip took us to Wakayama Prefecture. At the first restaurant, we had Wakayama ramen and Mehari-zushi.

programme.title: Discovering Local Ramen by Car Ep16
programme.desc: The Wakayama drive-in ramen trip continues to Kajika Drive-in, where we had Chinese soba noodles and the famous Kakinoha sushi.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen Ep09
programme.desc: Jeremy is on a chicken farm learning how their slow reared chicken are raised before firing up the BBQ in his mobile kitchen.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen Ep10
programme.desc: After a lesson in foraging for mushrooms, Jeremy uses his find in a comforting crispy dish, Tempura Medley of Mushrooms.

programme.desc: Justine Schofield inspires home cooks to get more out of their kitchen by simplifying gourmet food.

programme.title: Beyond Bali: the World's Most Exotic Islands Ep08
programme.desc: In West Timor, Lara is reunited with her father's birthplace, meeting extended family, learning home-cooked recipes, and deepening her connection to her Indonesian heritage.

programme.title: Finding Lost Recipes Ep01
programme.desc: In this episode of Finding Lost Recipes, chef Jonathan Ng steps in to help, starting with an emotional visit to Hong Ling's family home.

programme.title: Ready Jet Cook Ep01
programme.desc: Chef Jet Tila cooks up some easy comfort classics. He kicks things off with one of his favorite dishes that is deceptively simple -- Lo Mein.

programme.desc: In this TV series, Adam inspires Italian chefs to explore uncharted territories, urging them to craft innovative spaghetti dishes using exotic ingredients from diverse cultures.
